1994: Recover a small amount of HP. Can be sold for a lot of money.
Target: [7d 0] Max amount you can hold: [7d 1]
[END]
1995: Heal status ailment ”Confuse.” Can be sold for a lot of money.
Target: [7d 0] Max amount you can hold: [7d 1]
[END]
1996: Heal a small amount of MP. Can be sold for a lot of money.
Target: [7d 0] Max amount you can hold: [7d 1]
[END]
1997: Instantly level up. 
Target: [7d 0] Max amount you can hold: [7d 1]
[END]
